hero.name: Emirhan Kaya
hero.tagline: Systems that scale, code that lasts

meta.title: Emirhan Kaya - Portfolio
meta.description: Backend Developer | Java/Spring Boot, .NET, distributed systems

about.heading: About
about.bio: I'm a backend developer working mainly with Java/Kotlin Spring Boot and .NET/C#. Over the past few years I've been building distributed systems: event-driven architectures with Kafka and RabbitMQ, microservices following 12/15-factor principles, auth flows with JWT and KeyCloak. What I care about most is writing code that holds up under load, is easy to debug at 2 AM, and makes sense to whoever reads it next.

bullets: Designing microservices with Kotlin + Spring Boot, following 12/15-factor principles
Implementing JWT authentication and inter-service security via X-Service-Token
Setting up Redis caching and managing database schemas with Flyway
Building event-driven pipelines with RabbitMQ and Kafka

planbanimation.company: Plan B Animation and Game Studio
bullets: Owned backend infrastructure across multiple client-facing projects
Delivered production services end-to-end, from architecture to deployment and monitoring
Led and mentored a team of 3 junior backend developers
Built e-commerce backends with multi-language support and Stripe/Sellix payment integration
Developed authentication flows and complex shopping cart logic
Designed database schemas and optimized slow-running queries
Developed a playable Flappy Bird game on STM32 using C/C++
Worked with real-time embedded programming and direct hardware integration
Built an Uber-style ride-sharing app backend with .NET
Implemented real-time features, geolocation services, and RESTful APIs

microservices.name: Microservices Java
microservices.description: Distributed system built on Spring Boot and Spring Cloud. Services discover each other through Eureka, communicate asynchronously via RabbitMQ, and each own their PostgreSQL database with Flyway-managed migrations. A centralized API gateway handles rate limiting and routing. Everything runs in Docker containers with circuit breakers (Resilience4j), centralized logging (ELK), and distributed tracing for observability.
microservices.shortDescription: Spring Boot microservices with service discovery and event-driven messaging

flappybird.name: STM32 Flappy Bird
flappybird.description: Fully playable Flappy Bird running on an STM32F429I-DISC0 board's built-in LCD touchscreen. Uses TouchGFX for hardware-accelerated 2D rendering at 60 FPS. The game loop handles collision detection, gravity physics, scrolling obstacles, and score tracking in real time. Built to explore embedded C/C++ programming and real-time constraints on an ARM Cortex-M4.
flappybird.shortDescription: Flappy Bird on STM32 | TouchGFX, 60 FPS, tap-to-play

behaviorwatch.name: BehaviorWatch AI
behaviorwatch.description: Surveillance system that detects cigarette smoking in real time using a custom-trained YOLOv8 model and OpenCV. Handles multiple camera streams, configurable detection zones, and auto-generates timestamped alerts. Built for no-smoking areas like hospitals, schools, and transit stations. Includes a dashboard for reviewing flagged incidents.
behaviorwatch.shortDescription: Real-time smoking detection with YOLOv8 and OpenCV

bunqchat.name: Bunq Chat Backend
bunqchat.description: Messaging backend built for the Bunq coding challenge. PHP with clean architecture: domain, application, and infrastructure layers kept separate. RESTful API for user management, conversations, and messages with pagination and threading. Covered by unit tests throughout.
bunqchat.shortDescription: Chat backend in PHP with clean architecture

allinpro.name: AllInPro E-Commerce
allinpro.description: End-to-end e-commerce platform built with PHP and MySQL. Covers the full flow: product catalog with filtering, persistent shopping cart, checkout with payment gateway, and an admin panel for inventory and orders. Includes role-based auth, email notifications, image uploads, and responsive mobile design. Handles concurrent checkouts with proper DB locking.
allinpro.shortDescription: E-commerce platform with payments, admin panel, and mobile support

cansat.name: CanSat Ground Control
cansat.description: Ground station for the CanSat competition (NASA / Lockheed Martin). Receives live telemetry from a miniature satellite during descent and displays it in real-time graphs: altitude, temperature, pressure, GPS. Built with Python and PyQt5. Includes 3D trajectory visualization, CSV logging, and serial port recovery. Successfully used during the ST FOCOUNT team's competition flight at 1 Hz telemetry.
cansat.shortDescription: CanSat ground station | live telemetry, 3D trajectory, GPS tracking

farkle.name: Farkle Dice Game
farkle.description: Full-stack Farkle dice game. Kotlin/Spring Boot backend manages game state, scoring, turn validation, and multiplayer sessions over REST. Next.js/TypeScript frontend handles the interactive dice-rolling UI with real-time updates. Containerized with Docker Compose. Players roll six dice, pick which to keep, and decide whether to bank or push their luck.
farkle.shortDescription: Full-stack Farkle | Kotlin backend, Next.js frontend, multiplayer

facerecognition.name: Face Recognition AI
facerecognition.description: Face recognition pipeline using ArcFace (ONNX) and YOLOv8-Face, built without InsightFace for numpy 2.x compatibility. Detects faces, normalizes to 112x112, generates 512-dim embeddings, and matches against a database with configurable thresholds. Works with webcam, IP camera, or single images. Minimal dependencies: just ONNXRuntime, OpenCV, and two model files.
facerecognition.shortDescription: Face recognition with ArcFace + YOLOv8, no InsightFace needed

patientdonation.name: Patient Donation Platform
patientdonation.description: Web app that connects patients in need with donors using ML-based matching. Built with ASP.NET (C#) and JavaScript. The matching engine considers urgency, medical condition, and location to pair requests with the right donors. Includes donor registration, patient verification, and a dashboard for tracking donations and impact.
patientdonation.shortDescription: Patient-donor matching platform powered by ML

fixedwing2021.subtitle: Finalist
fixedwing2021.description: TEKNOFEST International Fixed-Wing UAV Competition. Handled the image processing and computer vision pipeline for the team.
